title: fix: move ACE-Step config to encrypted secrets + add auth
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Backstage passes required
gist.blurb: We've added some extra security to our ACE-Step music generation backend. Just making sure only the right bees can access the instruments!
gist.summary: Moved ACE-Step music service configuration to encrypted secrets and added bearer token authentication for internal API calls.
gist.impact: Improves backend security for audio generation services without affecting the public API experience.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a security guard or holding a key/padlock next to a music speaker or server rack. The robot showing a VIP backstage pass.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, holding a glowing golden key next to a retro server rack that looks like a giant boombox. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head holds up a VIP backstage pass. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, holding a glowing golden key next to a retro server rack that looks like a giant boombox.
